name: Dijkstra's Shortest Path
description:
Dijkstra's Algorithm

Dijkstra's algorithm finds the shortest path from a starting node to all other reachable nodes in a weighted graph with non-negative edge weights.

  • Priority Queue (Min-Heap): Always explores the node with the lowest cumulative distance from the start node first.
  • Relaxation: It updates the shortest known distance to a neighbor if passing through the current node yields a shorter path.
  • Visited Set: Once a node is popped from the priority queue, its shortest path is guaranteed and it is marked visited.
